title: Vanillium
description: A collection of many small vanilla-ish features.
body:
![Vanillium Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamVoided/VoidedAssets/refs/heads/main/mods/vanillium/logo.png)
---
A collection of many small vanilla-ish features.

# What is this mod about

As the text above says, this is just a collection of small vanilla-ish features that I wanted on my vanilla world.
Everything is configurable, so you can disable any of the features you don't want.
The main goal for this mod is to add features that won't case long term damage to your worlds and allow you to remove
the mod if you no longer want to use it.

This is a sister mod to Nullium as it adds features that cant be server-side only!

# The Things in the mod

## Item Customization:

- Changing item max stack size. (By default, the mod increases the stack size of potions, music discs and horse
  equipment to be 16)
- Changing item max durability size. (By default, the mod increases brush and shear durability to 256)
- Adding custom cooldowns to items. (By default, the mod adds cooldowns to splash and lingering potions)
- Extended Potion durability. A multipliers applied to all registered potions. (By default, it's set to be x2)

## Experimental
 Warning All these are experimental for a reason. The shulker opening my cause inventory de-sync.
- Shulker changes:
    - When in inventory, if you right-click with an item on or use a shulker to right-click on an item. It now puts the
      item in the shulker.
    - When right-clicking in the air with a shulker or right-clicking on a shulker in inventory it opens a shulker box
      menu.
